nl: 画直线 AB，点 O 在直线 AB 上，OC 垂直 OD。已知 ∠AOC=120°，标出 ∠BOD。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "line", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "OC", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "C"}, {"id": "OD", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "D"}], "constraints": [{"type": "collinear", "points": ["A", "O", "B"]}, {"type": "length", "segment": "OC", "value": 4.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "OD", "value": 4.0}, {"type": "angle", "a": "A", "b": "O", "c": "C", "value": 120.0}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "OC", "b": "OD"}], "annotations": [{"target": "angleAOC", "kind": "angle", "show": true, "text": null}, {"target": "angleBOD", "kind": "angle", "show": true, "text": null}], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "O": "O", "C": "C", "D": "D"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画圆 O，PA、PB 是圆 O 的两条切线，A、B 是切点，∠APB=50°。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "P", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "PA", "kind": "segment", "a": "P", "b": "A"}, {"id": "PB", "kind": "segment", "a": "P", "b": "B"}, {"id": "OA", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "A"}, {"id": "OB", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "B"}, {"id": "circ", "kind": "circle", "definition": {"type": "center_radius", "center": "O", "radius": 2.0}}], "constraints": [{"type": "on_circle", "point": "A", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "B", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "tangent", "line": "PA", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "tangent", "line": "PB", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "angle", "a": "A", "b": "P", "c": "B", "value": 50.0}], "annotations": [{"target": "angleAPB", "kind": "angle", "show": true, "text": null}], "labels": {"O": "O", "P": "P", "A": "A", "B": "B"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画矩形 ABCD，点 E 在 BC 上，点 F 在 AD 上，AF=EC，连接 AE、CF。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "E", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "F", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "CD", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "D"}, {"id": "DA", "kind": "segment", "a": "D", "b": "A"}, {"id": "AE", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "E"}, {"id": "CF", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "F"}, {"id": "AF", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "F"}, {"id": "EC", "kind": "segment", "a": "E", "b": "C"}, {"id": "rect", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "B", "C", "D"]}], "constraints": [{"type": "perpendicular", "a": "AB", "b": "BC"}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "BC", "b": "CD"}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "CD", "b": "DA"}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AB", "value": 6.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "BC", "value": 4.0}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["B", "E", "C"]}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["A", "F", "D"]}, {"type": "equal_length", "segments": ["AF", "EC"]}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AF", "value": 2.0}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D", "E": "E", "F": "F"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画四边形 ABCD，其中 ∠ACB=∠DAC，∠ACD=∠BAC。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "CD", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "D"}, {"id": "DA", "kind": "segment", "a": "D", "b": "A"}, {"id": "AC", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "C"}, {"id": "quad", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "B", "C", "D"]}], "constraints": [{"type": "parallel", "a": "DA", "b": "BC"}, {"type": "parallel", "a": "AB", "b": "CD"}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AB", "value": 6.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "BC", "value": 4.0}, {"type": "angle", "a": "D", "b": "A", "c": "B", "value": 70.0}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画三角形 ABC 及其外接圆 O，AD 是圆 O 的直径，AD 垂直 BC 于点 E。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "E", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "CA", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "A"}, {"id": "AD", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "D"}, {"id": "tri", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "B", "C"]}, {"id": "circ", "kind": "circle", "definition": {"type": "circumcircle", "of": "tri"}}], "constraints": [{"type": "length", "segment": "AB", "value": 5.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "BC", "value": 7.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "CA", "value": 6.0}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "D", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["A", "O", "D"]}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "AD", "b": "BC"}, {"type": "foot_of_perp", "f": "E", "p": "A", "a": "B", "b": "C"}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D", "E": "E", "O": "O"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画等腰三角形 ABC，AB=AC=5，∠BAC=40°。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "CA", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "A"}, {"id": "tri", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "B", "C"]}], "constraints": [{"type": "isoceles", "polygon": "tri", "apex": "A"}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AB", "value": 5.0}, {"type": "angle", "a": "B", "b": "A", "c": "C", "value": 40.0}], "annotations": [{"target": "AB", "kind": "length", "show": true, "text": null}, {"target": "CA", "kind": "length", "show": true, "text": null}, {"target": "angleBAC", "kind": "angle", "show": true, "text": null}], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画圆 O，AB 是圆 O 的直径，点 C 为圆上一点，AC=3，作 ∠ABC 的平分线交 AC 于 D。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "AC", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "C"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "BD", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "D"}, {"id": "circ", "kind": "circle", "definition": {"type": "center_radius", "center": "O", "radius": 2.5}}], "constraints": [{"type": "on_circle", "point": "A", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "B", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "C", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["A", "O", "B"]}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AC", "value": 3.0}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["A", "D", "C"]}, {"type": "angle_bisector", "a": "A", "b": "B", "c": "C", "d": "D"}], "annotations": [{"target": "AC", "kind": "length", "show": true, "text": null}], "labels": {"O": "O", "A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画等腰直角三角形 ABC，∠A=90°，BC=4。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "CA", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "A"}, {"id": "tri", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "B", "C"]}], "constraints": [{"type": "right_triangle", "polygon": "tri", "right_at": "A"}, {"type": "equal_length", "segments": ["AB", "CA"]}, {"type": "length", "segment": "BC", "value": 4.0}], "annotations": [{"target": "BC", "kind": "length", "show": true, "text": null}], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画角 ∠BAC=60°，AD 是这个角的平分线，AD=10，作 AD 的垂直平分线交 AC 于点 F，过 D 作 DE 垂直 AC 于点 E。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "E", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "F", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "M", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "AC", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "C"}, {"id": "AD", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "D"}, {"id": "AF", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "F"}, {"id": "DE", "kind": "segment", "a": "D", "b": "E"}, {"id": "DF", "kind": "segment", "a": "D", "b": "F"}, {"id": "MF", "kind": "segment", "a": "M", "b": "F"}], "constraints": [{"type": "angle", "a": "B", "b": "A", "c": "C", "value": 60.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AB", "value": 8.0}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AC", "value": 12.0}, {"type": "angle_bisector", "a": "B", "b": "A", "c": "C", "d": "D"}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AD", "value": 10.0}, {"type": "foot_of_perp", "f": "E", "p": "D", "a": "A", "b": "C"}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["A", "F", "C"]}, {"type": "midpoint", "m": "M", "a": "A", "b": "D"}, {"type": "equal_length", "segments": ["AF", "DF"]}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "MF", "b": "AD"}], "annotations": [{"target": "AD", "kind": "length", "show": true, "text": null}, {"target": "angleBAC", "kind": "angle", "show": true, "text": null}], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D", "E": "E", "F": "F", "M": "M"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 在坐标系中画反比例函数 y=6/x 的图像，A、B 两点都在函数图像上，直线 AB 经过原点。

nl: 画圆 O，AB 是圆的弦，D、C 为圆上另两点，连接 OD、OC。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "OC", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "C"}, {"id": "OD", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "D"}, {"id": "circ", "kind": "circle", "definition": {"type": "center_radius", "center": "O", "radius": 4.0}}], "constraints": [{"type": "on_circle", "point": "A", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "B", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "C", "circle": "circ"}, {"type": "on_circle", "point": "D", "circle": "circ"}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"O": "O", "A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

type: 正方形·等腰直角三角形嵌入
nl: 画正方形 ABCD 和等腰直角三角形 AEF，其中 ∠AFE=90°，AE=AF，H 是 CE 的中点，连接 FH。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "C", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "D", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "E", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "F", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "H", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "BC", "kind": "segment", "a": "B", "b": "C"}, {"id": "CD", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "D"}, {"id": "DA", "kind": "segment", "a": "D", "b": "A"}, {"id": "AE", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "E"}, {"id": "EF", "kind": "segment", "a": "E", "b": "F"}, {"id": "FA", "kind": "segment", "a": "F", "b": "A"}, {"id": "CE", "kind": "segment", "a": "C", "b": "E"}, {"id": "FH", "kind": "segment", "a": "F", "b": "H"}, {"id": "sq", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "B", "C", "D"]}, {"id": "tri", "kind": "polygon", "vertices": ["A", "E", "F"]}], "constraints": [{"type": "equal_length", "segments": ["AB", "BC", "CD", "DA"]}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "AB", "b": "BC"}, {"type": "perpendicular", "a": "BC", "b": "CD"}, {"type": "length", "segment": "AB", "value": 4.0}, {"type": "right_triangle", "polygon": "tri", "right_at": "F"}, {"type": "equal_length", "segments": ["FA", "EF"]}, {"type": "length", "segment": "FA", "value": 3.0}, {"type": "midpoint", "m": "H", "a": "C", "b": "E"}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"A": "A", "B": "B", "C": "C", "D": "D", "E": "E", "F": "F", "H": "H"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画抛物线 y²=4x，标出焦点 F，画出准线，取点 A 在抛物线上，过 A 作准线的垂线，垂足为 B。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "ax", "kind": "axis", "origin": "O", "x_range": [-3.0, 6.0], "y_range": [-4.0, 4.0], "tick_step": 1.0, "show_grid": true, "show_ticks": true, "x_label": "x", "y_label": "y"}, {"id": "c_upper", "kind": "curve", "expr": "2*sqrt(x)", "var": "x", "domain": [0.0, 6.0], "samples": 300, "color": "#0d6efd", "dash": null}, {"id": "c_lower", "kind": "curve", "expr": "-2*sqrt(x)", "var": "x", "domain": [0.0, 6.0], "samples": 300, "color": "#0d6efd", "dash": null}, {"id": "F", "kind": "point", "hint": [1.0, 0.0]}, {"id": "D1", "kind": "point", "hint": [-1.0, 4.0]}, {"id": "D2", "kind": "point", "hint": [-1.0, -4.0]}, {"id": "directrix", "kind": "line", "a": "D1", "b": "D2"}, {"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": [2.0, 2.828]}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": [-1.0, 2.828]}, {"id": "AB", "kind": "segment", "a": "A", "b": "B"}], "constraints": [{"type": "on_curve", "point": "A", "curve": "c_upper"}, {"type": "foot_of_perp", "f": "B", "p": "A", "a": "D1", "b": "D2"}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"O": "O", "F": "F", "A": "A", "B": "B"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}

nl: 画椭圆 x²/4 + y²/2 = 1，过点(0, -2)画直线 l 与椭圆交于 A、B 两点，O 为原点，连接 OA、OB。
dsl_json: {"version": "0.1", "objects": [{"id": "O", "kind": "point", "hint": null}, {"id": "ax", "kind": "axis", "origin": "O", "x_range": [-3.0, 3.0], "y_range": [-3.0, 2.0], "tick_step": 1.0, "show_grid": true, "show_ticks": true, "x_label": "x", "y_label": "y"}, {"id": "c_upper", "kind": "curve", "expr": "sqrt(2 - x**2/2)", "var": "x", "domain": [-2.0, 2.0], "samples": 200, "color": "#0d6efd", "dash": null}, {"id": "c_lower", "kind": "curve", "expr": "-sqrt(2 - x**2/2)", "var": "x", "domain": [-2.0, 2.0], "samples": 200, "color": "#0d6efd", "dash": null}, {"id": "P", "kind": "point", "hint": [0.0, -2.0]}, {"id": "A", "kind": "point", "hint": [1.6, 0.87]}, {"id": "B", "kind": "point", "hint": [-1.6, -0.87]}, {"id": "l", "kind": "line", "a": "A", "b": "B"}, {"id": "OA", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "A"}, {"id": "OB", "kind": "segment", "a": "O", "b": "B"}], "constraints": [{"type": "on_curve", "point": "A", "curve": "c_upper"}, {"type": "on_curve", "point": "B", "curve": "c_lower"}, {"type": "collinear", "points": ["P", "A", "B"]}], "annotations": [], "labels": {"O": "O", "A": "A", "B": "B", "P": "P"}, "style": {"theme": "classroom", "stroke": "#222", "stroke_width": 1.6, "point_radius": 3.0, "aux_dash": "5 4", "font_size": 14.0, "font_family": "PingFang SC, Source Han Sans SC, Noto Sans CJK SC, sans-serif"}}
